mapper.select: /* SmsRetryMapper.getSmsRetryList */ SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , A.RCPT_DATA , A.CALLBACK_NUM , A.MSG_TYPE , A.MSG_TYPE_SECOND , A.SUBJECT , A.MESSAGE , A.RESERVED01 , A.RESERVED02 , A.RESERVED03 , A.FAIL_SEND , A.K_TMPLCODE , A.K_MESSAGE , A.K_SENDERKEY , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + (5/24/60) + ((1/24/60) * TRUNC((ROWNUM - 1) / 100) * 10), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS scheduleTime , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCount , ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , B.RCPT_DATA , B.CALLBACK_NUM , B.MSG_TYPE , B.MSG_TYPE_SECOND , B.SUBJECT , B.MESSAGE , B.RESERVED01 , B.RESERVED02 , B.RESERVED03 , B.FAIL_SEND , B.K_TMPLCODE , B.K_MESSAGE , B.K_SENDERKEY , A.SEND_CNT , A.TEMPLATE_ID FROM MSP_SMS_RESEND_MST A , AM2X_SUBMIT_LOG B WHERE A.MSG_ID = B.MSG_ID AND NOT (B.RESULT = '0' OR (B.KKO_RESULT IS NOT NULL AND B.KKO_RESULT = '0')) ) A , MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST B WHERE A.TEMPLATE_ID = B.TEMPLATE_ID AND A.SEND_CNT <= B.RETRY
